title: selago trauseldii
intro: Selago trauseldii, also known as Trautvetter's blue cushion or Trautvetter's selaginella, is a flowering plant species native to the mountainous regions of Central and Eastern Europe. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, making it useful in treating various health conditions such as arthritis and improving overall immune function. The health benefits of Selago trauseldii include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory issues, and even have potential anti-cancer properties. The herbal preparations of Selago trauseldii involve infusions or teas made from its leaves and flowers, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
